org.apache.paimon.flink.action.cdc.format

Interface RecordParserFactory

  • Functional Interface:
    This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.

    @FunctionalInterface
public interface RecordParserFactory
    Represents a factory for creating instances of RecordParser.

    This interface provides a method to create a new RecordParser with specific configurations such as case sensitivity, table name conversion, and computed columns.

    See Also:
    RecordParser

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      RecordParser createParser(boolean caseSensitive, TypeMapping typeMapping, List<ComputedColumn> computedColumns)
      Creates a new instance of RecordParser with the specified configurations.

    • Method Detail

      • createParser

        RecordParser createParser(boolean caseSensitive,
                          TypeMapping typeMapping,
                          List<ComputedColumn> computedColumns)
        Creates a new instance of RecordParser with the specified configurations.
        Parameters:
        caseSensitive - Indicates whether the parser should be case-sensitive.
        typeMapping - Data type mapping options.
        computedColumns - List of computed columns to be considered by the parser.
        Returns:
        A new instance of RecordParser.
